name: Justice & Court Management
description: Complete court and justice system management — manage legal cases, track lawyers, schedule hearings, and record verdicts with full case timelines and document tracking.
author: AENEWS

capabilities.name: searchCases
capabilities.description: Search for legal cases by number, type, or status

capabilities.name: createHearing
capabilities.description: Schedule a new court hearing for a case

capabilities.name: getLawyer
capabilities.description: Get lawyer profile with active cases and specialization

capabilities.name: updateVerdict
capabilities.description: Record or update a case verdict

capabilities.name: deleteHearing
capabilities.description: Cancel or delete a scheduled hearing

capabilities.name: getCase
capabilities.description: Get case details with full timeline and parties

capabilities.name: searchLawyers
capabilities.description: Search lawyers by name, specialization, or bar number

permissions.name: Read
permissions.description: Read justice data including cases, lawyers, and hearings

permissions.name: Write
permissions.description: Create/Update cases, lawyers, hearings, and verdicts

permissions.name: Delete
permissions.description: Delete cases, hearing records, and verdict documents

permissions.name: Admin
permissions.description: Full justice administration including court settings and access control
